title: bufonia stricta var. euboica
intro: Bufonia stricta var. euboica, also known as the Euboean bufonia, is a plant species belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. Bufonia stricta var. euboica can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
